title: MeatBlocks
description: Mod created by SolventJ which adds meat blocks.
body:
### MeatBlocks
This is a mod that adds raw meat blocks, their cooked versions and a rotten flesh block.
- Raw meat blocks are made from 9 pieces of raw meat.
- Cooked meat blocks are made from 9 pieces of cooked meat or by smelting/smoking raw meat blocks.
- Rotten flesh block from 9 pieces rotten flesh.
- **All blocks can be decrafted**.
